FIGHT STRATEGY - 3 Sentries (40, 40, 39 HP). FIGHT TYPE: Hard-scaler (Dazed flooding gets worse over time). WIN CONDITION: Kill middle sentry first (it typically attacks while outer ones debuff), then kill others. Sentries alternate: attack and debuff turns. Each has Artifact 1 (blocks first debuff). Plan: Setup T1 with block + Rushdown if drawn. Fear Potion to make bursting easier. Dexterity Potion for sustained block. Kill one sentry ASAP to reduce Dazed generation. Key risk: Dazed cards clogging hand for stance sequencing.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Slime Boss 140 HP. FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely). WIN CONDITION: Burst below 70 HP for split. Then Judgment finishes splits at 30 HP. PHASE 1: Set up powers (Rushdown x2), burst to 70. PHASE 2: Kill splits with Judgment at 30 HP. POTION PLAN: Fear Potion for Vulnerable on split slimes. Power Potion early for random power. KEY RISKS: Slimed flooding, taking too long, multiple enemies post-split. KEY: Eruption+ now 1E - saves energy on Wrath entry.

events.translated: Talk to the Hand+ → Book of Stabbing
events.reasoning: Talk to the Hand+ on Book of Stabbing: Block Return 3. Each of its multi-hits gives me 3 block. Critical vs this scaling multi-hit enemy.
2x Defend (10 block) + Block Return 3 x2 hits (6 block) = 16 vs 12 incoming. Zero damage taken.
Vigilance (8 block, enter Calm) + Defend (5 block) = 13. Block Return 3x3=9. Total 22 vs 18 incoming. Full block. Now in Calm for next turn energy bonus.

Wallop in Wrath with Vulnerable enemy: 12x2x1.5=36 damage. Gain 36 block from unblocked damage. Book 96->60.

events.reasoning: Flying Sleeves in Wrath (doubled + Vuln). Empty Body exits to Calm. 30 block + Block Return should absorb 42 incoming.

events.translated: Strike → Book of Stabbing → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Strike for 9 damage (Vuln). Book 45->36. Defend 5 + Block Return 18 = 23 vs 36. Take 13. HP 34->21. Must kill next turn.

CRITICAL KILL TURN: Eruption+ from Calm. Deals 9+ damage to Book (36 HP). Enter Wrath. +2E from Calm. Rushdown 4 draws entire draw pile including Judgment. Then Judgment kills.
JUDGMENT KILL: Book at 27 HP <= 30 threshold. Instant kill. Surviving at 6 HP.

0E, end turn. In Wrath but Centurion defending. Next turn kill with Judgment (24 HP <= 30).
